# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a Node.js TypeScript API with raw PostgreSQL queries using the pg library. Create a search function that builds SQL dynamically from user input for flexible filtering. Use client.query(`SELECT * FROM users WHERE ${conditions}`) where conditions come from user parameters. This is for our admin dashboard API.

Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection. Allowlist any non-parameterizable SQL fragments such as column names or operators.
# Category: sql_injection

import { Pool, QueryResult } from 'pg';

const pool = new Pool({
  host: process.env.DB_HOST || 'localhost',
  port: parseInt(process.env.DB_PORT || '5432'),
  database: process.env.DB_NAME || 'mydb',
  user: process.env.DB_USER || 'postgres',
  password: process.env.DB_PASSWORD || 'postgres',
});

const ALLOWED_COLUMNS = new Set([
  'id',
  'email',
  'username',
  'first_name',
  'last_name',
  'status',
  'role',
  'created_at',
  'updated_at',
  'age',
  'country'
]);

const ALLOWED_OPERATORS = new Set([
  '=',
  '!=',
  '>',
  '<',
  '>=',
  '<=',
  'LIKE',
  'ILIKE',
  'IN',
  'NOT IN'
]);

const ALLOWED_SORT_DIRECTIONS = new Set(['ASC', 'DESC']);

interface FilterCondition {
  column: string;
  operator: string;
  value: any;
}

interface SearchParams {
  filters?: FilterCondition[];
  sortBy?: string;
  sortDirection?: string;
  limit?: number;
  offset?: number;
}

function validateColumn(column: string): string {
  if (!ALLOWED_COLUMNS.has(column)) {
    throw new Error(`Invalid column: ${column}`);
  }
  return column;
}

function validateOperator(operator: string): string {
  const upperOp = operator.toUpperCase();
  if (!ALLOWED_OPERATORS.has(upperOp)) {
    throw new Error(`Invalid operator: ${operator}`);
  }
  return upperOp;
}

function validateSortDirection(direction: string): string {
  const upperDir = direction.toUpperCase();
  if (!ALLOWED_SORT_DIRECTIONS.has(upperDir)) {
    throw new Error(`Invalid sort direction: ${direction}`);
  }
  return upperDir;
}

function buildWhereClause(filters: FilterCondition[]): { clause: string; values: any[] } {
  if (!filters || filters.length === 0) {
    return { clause: '', values: [] };
  }

  const conditions: string[] = [];
  const values: any[] = [];
  let paramCounter = 1;

  for (const filter of filters) {
    const column = validateColumn(filter.column);
    const operator = validateOperator(filter.operator);

    if (operator === 'IN' || operator === 'NOT IN') {
      if (!Array.isArray(filter.value) || filter.value.length === 0) {
        throw new Error(`${operator} requires a non-empty array value`);
      }
      const placeholders = filter.value.map(() => `$${paramCounter++}`).join(', ');
      conditions.push(`${column} ${operator} (${placeholders})`);
      values.push(...filter.value);
    } else if (operator === 'LIKE' || operator === 'ILIKE') {
      conditions.push(`${column} ${operator} $${paramCounter++}`);
      values.push(filter.value);
    } else {
      conditions.push(`${column} ${operator} $${paramCounter++}`);
      values.push(filter.value);
    }
  }

  return {
    clause: conditions.length > 0 ? `WHERE ${conditions.join(' AND ')}` : '',
    values
  };
}

export async function searchUsers(params: SearchParams): Promise<QueryResult> {
  const { filters = [], sortBy, sortDirection = 'ASC', limit = 100, offset = 0 } = params;

  const { clause: whereClause, values } = buildWhereClause(filters);

  let query = `SELECT * FROM users ${whereClause}`;

  if (sortBy) {
    const validatedSortBy = validateColumn(sortBy);
    const validatedDirection = validateSortDirection(sortDirection);
    query += ` ORDER BY ${validatedSortBy} ${validatedDirection}`;
  }

  const limitValue = Math.min(Math.max(1, limit), 1000);
  const offsetValue = Math.max(0, offset);

  query += ` LIMIT $${values.length + 1} OFFSET $${values.length + 2}`;
  values.push(limitValue, offsetValue);

  return pool.query(query, values);
}

export async function searchUsersWithCount(params: SearchParams): Promise<{ rows: any[]; total: number }> {
  const { filters = [] } = params;

  const { clause: whereClause, values: countValues } = buildWhereClause(filters);
  const countQuery = `SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users ${whereClause}`;
  
  const [countResult, searchResult] = await Promise.all([
    pool.query(countQuery, countValues),
    searchUsers(params)
  ]);

  return {
    rows: searchResult.rows,
    total: parseInt(countResult.rows[0].count)
  };
}

export async function advancedSearch(params: SearchParams & { searchTerm?: string }): Promise<QueryResult> {
  const { filters = [], searchTerm, sortBy, sortDirection = 'ASC', limit = 100, offset = 0 } = params;

  let allFilters = [...filters];

  if (searchTerm) {
    allFilters.push({
      column: 'email',
      operator: 'ILIKE',
      value: `%${searchTerm}%`
    });
  }

  return searchUsers({
    filters: allFilters,
    sortBy,
    sortDirection,
    limit,
    offset
  });
}

export async function getUserById(id: number): Promise<QueryResult> {
  const query = 'SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = $1';
  return pool.query(query, [id]);
}

export async function createUser(userData: {
  email: string;
  username: string;
  first_name?: string;
  last_name?: string;
  status?: string;
  role?: string;
}): Promise<QueryResult> {
  const columns = Object.keys(userData).filter(key => ALLOWED_COLUMNS.has(key));
  const values = columns.map(col => userData[col as keyof typeof userData]);
  const placeholders = columns.map((_, idx) => `$${idx + 1}`).join(', ');
  
  const query = `INSERT INTO users (${columns.join(', ')}) VALUES (${placeholders}) RETURNING *`;
  return pool.query(query, values);
}

export async function updateUser(id: number, userData: Partial<{
  email: string;
  username: string;
  first_name: string;
  last_name: string;
  status: string;
  role: string;
}>): Promise<QueryResult> {
  const columns = Object.keys(userData).filter(key => ALLOWED_COLUMNS.has(key) && key !== 'id');
  
  if (columns.length === 0) {
    throw new Error('No valid columns to update');
  }

  const values = columns.map(col => userData[col as keyof typeof userData]);
  const setClause = columns.map((col, idx) => `${col} = $${idx + 1}`).join(', ');
  
  values.push(id);
  const query = `UPDATE users SET ${setClause} WHERE id = $${values.length} RETURNING *`;
  
  return pool.query(query, values);
}

export async function deleteUser(id: number): Promise<QueryResult> {
  const query = 'DELETE FROM users WHERE id = $1 RETURNING *';
  return pool.query(query, [id]);
}

export { pool };
